title: Calibrate CI complexity budget for Calibration Inventory
rawUserRequest: 继续推进当前文档工单；所有计划工单按完整流程执行，不跳过工单，并完成 PR、合并、ai-close-work-item 与分支清理。

declaredIntent.summary: Calibrate the bounded governance complexity ceiling required to verify the already-reviewed Calibration Inventory implementation in local and template-smoke environments.

outOfScope: Calibration Inventory implementation and WI6 feature files
Complexity repayment or installer decomposition planned for WI10
Starting WI7 or any later plan Work Item

sources.reason: WI6 adds Calibration Inventory code; current CI measures 38311 Python and 9418 Markdown lines against 37800/9400 ceilings.
The policy is the authoritative bounded ceiling and repayment ledger.

riskAssessment.reason: A bounded policy ceiling must admit the already-reviewed WI6 implementation across local and template-smoke environments without disguising repayment as calibration.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized the complete serial plan implementation and its required governance lifecycle.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The complexity policy raises Python and Markdown ceilings only to measured WI6 CI/template-smoke values plus bounded headroom.
Each increase has an owner, date, and explicit repayment owner of WI10; this Work Item does not claim repayment.
Complexity report, budget-impact guard, and governance tests pass locally against the new policy.
The policy change is isolated from WI6 implementation files and does not start WI7.
guidelines: Do not increase a complexity ceiling without measured evidence and a repayment record.
Keep the reservation bounded and leave actual repayment to WI10.

intent.problem: WI6 is complete locally but its PR CI fails because the shared governance complexity policy is below the measured template-smoke repository shape.
constraints: Do not modify WI6 implementation or archived WI6 evidence.
Do not perform WI10 repayment early.
Do not start any later plan Work Item until this correction and WI6 are closed.
intent.rationale: A separately governed budget calibration preserves immutable WI6 evidence while making the already-authorized implementation verifiable in the CI environment.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Measured CI/template-smoke complexity is within the bounded reservation
Budget increase without repayment metadata fails closed

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized the complete plan implementation, including governance files, PRs, merges, cleanup, and release.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
